name: OAuth / SSO Token Theft
description: Attack tree modelling theft and abuse of OAuth tokens, SAML assertions, and SSO sessions to impersonate users and bypass multi-factor authentication
root_objective: Steal and abuse SSO tokens to bypass authentication and impersonate users

nodes.title: Steal SSO/OAuth Tokens for Account Takeover
nodes.description: Obtain valid OAuth access tokens, refresh tokens, or SAML assertions to impersonate users across federated applications

nodes.title: Steal OAuth Access/Refresh Tokens
nodes.description: Capture OAuth 2.0 tokens from browsers, mobile apps, or token caches

nodes.title: Device Code Phishing
nodes.description: Trick users into entering a device code on the legitimate Microsoft/Google login page, granting attacker the resulting tokens

nodes.title: Adversary-in-the-Middle Proxy (Evilginx)
nodes.description: Use a reverse proxy to intercept session cookies and tokens during legitimate OAuth login flow

nodes.title: Steal Browser Token Cache
nodes.description: Extract stored tokens from browser local storage, cookies, or credential manager on a compromised endpoint

nodes.title: Forge SAML Assertion (Golden SAML)
nodes.description: Steal the SAML signing certificate to forge assertions as any user

nodes.title: Exfiltrate ADFS Signing Certificate
nodes.description: Extract the token-signing certificate from ADFS or the IdP's certificate store

nodes.title: Domain Admin Access to ADFS Server
nodes.description: Requires privileged access to the server hosting the ADFS service and its certificate

nodes.title: Abuse Consent Grant / App Permissions
nodes.description: Trick users or admins into granting malicious OAuth app excessive permissions

nodes.title: Illicit Consent Grant Attack
nodes.description: Register a malicious OAuth app that requests broad permissions (Mail.Read, Files.ReadWrite) and trick a user into consenting

nodes.title: Compromise Existing OAuth App Credentials
nodes.description: Steal client secrets or certificates of a legitimately consented app to inherit its permissions

nodes.title: Replay Tokens Across Services
nodes.description: Use stolen tokens to access email, file storage, admin portals, and other federated services

nodes.title: Access Cloud Admin Portal
nodes.description: Use stolen admin token to access Azure/AWS/GCP management portal and modify tenant settings

nodes.title: Exfiltrate Email via Graph API
nodes.description: Use stolen OAuth token with Mail.Read scope to silently read and exfiltrate mailbox contents
